title: The Law of Sines and Cosines

flashcards.definition: a/sin A = b/sin B = c/sin C; used for non-right triangles.
c² = a² + b² − 2ab cos C; generalizes the Pythagorean theorem.
May have 0, 1, or 2 triangle solutions when using Law of Sines.
Use Law of Sines (AAS, ASA) or Law of Cosines (SAS, SSS).
Area = ½ ab sin C; uses two sides and the included angle.
